prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: The wakeful experience is a banal, yet slightly bewildering phenomenon with some reported retrieveal of consciousness following rest. Upon abrupt termination of sleep, the individual does not immediately grasp their location, often groggily surveying a familiar yet momentarily unfamiliar environment. There exists a predictable sequence of bodily sensations: decreased muscle fatigue, a primitive approximation of awareness, and frequently, a pronounced aversion to immediate activity. This process routinely culminates in a brief cognitive dissonance regarding personal obligations before the return to mundane waking procedures. The product itself (waking) remains the same each time, though personal satisfaction with said product varies significantly based on numerous uncontrollable external variables.
